Home Experience Projects

Projects

Online Obi

A React, TailwindCSS, Firebase app that performs Obi divination resources

Schedule Hub

Full-stack Angular + Spring Boot automated event booking platform with conflict-detection logic and calendar/list views.

Roller Derby API

A REST API with four endpoints (Structure, Official Types, Rules, Officials), built with Node + EJS

My Gem Tarot

A Swift iOS app that consumes the Tarot REST API; uses CoreData persistence, CRUD operations, and custom UI.

Created by Quinise Ercolano
